name: better-seo-js-monorepo
description: Development workspace for Better SEO (@better-seo): typed SEO core (@better-seo/core), Next.js adapter (@better-seo/next), React + react-helmet-async (@better-seo/react), assets + CLI (@better-seo/assets, @better-seo/cli). CI runs Vitest coverage, Playwright (Next + Vite examples), Changesets, and core size-limit. Private meta-package; not published to npm.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @better-seo/core && npm run build -w @better-seo/assets && npm run build -w @better-seo/compiler && npm run build -w @better-seo/crawl && npm run build -w @better-seo/cli && npm run build -w @better-seo/next && npm run build -w @better-seo/react && npm run build -w nextjs-app && npm run build -w react-seo-vite-example
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @better-seo/core && npm run build -w @better-seo/assets && npm run build -w @better-seo/compiler && npm run build -w @better-seo/crawl && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @better-seo/core && npm run build -w @better-seo/assets && npm run build -w @better-seo/compiler && npm run build -w @better-seo/crawl && npm run build -w @better-seo/next && npm run build -w @better-seo/react && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && npm run size
